{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321130742ECAA586B52ACE312C6EC"}"},"total":133},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7326910295333913353","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书很好看而且也不圣母，我看到68章，我按照以往看小说的经验还以为主角会留下几个人的命的最多也就打残结果真接杀了，一点也不圣母好久没看到过这么好的修仙小说了，而且说杀就杀，现在我看到68章，主角基本上一直是无敌的也没有打输打不赢写的很好，这本书“爽 爽 爽”"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1705930039,"group_id":"7196520844430937143","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzaaGQ8WrCS/fHVEs2BTOyS0iesJ78Om9jtZcQeYGNmk","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1297841555253325","user_name":"Za星aZ"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1297841555253325","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7196520844430937143","book_info":{"abstract":"[女帝]  [非后宫] [架空朝代，治国，国战]  [剑道，武道，儒道，] 
夜华魂穿九洲大陆，被大夏帝国女皇帝收入后宫。
低调苟了三年，渐渐地，他膨胀了！
有一天在女帝寝室签到，被女帝推倒，随后被封为帝君。
本想继续摆烂，做个逍遥躺平的帝君，奈何女帝叫他治国。
好吧，谁让他文能出口成章惊大儒，提笔能治国安天下，武能翻手镇压修仙者呢！
他更有豪情侠骨，亦有柔肠，满腔热血付大夏江山，更不负美人恩。
从此黑龙台成立，斩贪官，杀佞臣，镇压修仙宗门！
某一天，无数修士大能来袭，想要覆灭大夏帝国，
没曾想，皇陵里飞出更多的绝世大能，他们傻眼了，喃喃惊呼，“老六，几千个老六！！”
紧跟着，一句震天彻地的威慑响起：“前方大夏帝国，修仙者禁行，违者杀！！！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o1a416f73c91295a16bc8008498ba65fb~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"唯如初见","author_id":"","book_id":"7196520844430937143","book_name":"大夏帝君，女帝是我老婆！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2147人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7196544540092990007","read_count":"2147","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1221709"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"711","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,女帝,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0a9d878511dc8ac1d22b212458eed5aa~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779253662&x-signature=pTbqLJKrmSJVvg6JWe3UCYGhqKw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"108218101630","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"111"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321130742ECAA586B52ACE312C6EC
